Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}Everywhere you look, you see young couples.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}Well, what're you waiting for? Go after someone![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}You're still young. You've got no excuse not to be together with some girl.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}You know the coffee shop, right? That fancy-looking one, Chagall.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}There's that club next to it. Kind of a "mature" hang-out spot, I suppose.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}I can't say I approve of places like that, but I suppose I can't tell you what to do.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}Those youngsters look like their souls have been taken...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}They better stop lounging around like that. They should go out, make some friends, enjoy life![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}This kind of place takes me back...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}Dance halls... We used to call 'em speakeasies! Those halls were packed with people...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}That's where I stole my wife's heart—at the dance hall! I was one hep cat back then...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}I heard "escapade" means "mischief."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}If I had to guess based on that place, I'd say it means, "Stay up all night and make lots of noise."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}I know this guy from when I was your age. He's a grave digger.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}He told me, "When you die, I'll dig you a fine, big grave."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}It was nice of him. Good friends are a blessing, they really are.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}Times have changed, but some things, like schools having ghost stories, never do.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}I used to sneak into the school grounds at night. The teachers would give me holy hell for it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}Say, what kinda dance is popular nowadays in the clubs? Reggae? That "rap" junk?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}In my day, it was the tango, or the jitterbug. You danced with your girl, not to show off.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}I fell in love at first sight with my wife at one of those dance halls...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}That mysterious Apathy Syndrome affecting couples is on the rise... Do you have a girlfriend?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}Men have to fight for their women, even if you know you can't win.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}I'm proud to say that's what I did in my day.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}I heard there's some scary shenanigans going on over those Intertubes these days.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}How about that? I'm pretty in the know for an old guy, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}It's summer vacation, isn't it? You young folk are supposed to be havin' the time of your lives.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}You're young. You have plenty of time to make mistakes. In the end, they'll all be fond memories.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}I like to take walks around the station, and sometimes I see a peculiar-looking girl.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}Now don't freak out, but listen to this... She's got a sword stuck through her head![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}I know those young girls like the piercings, but... through the entire head?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}Eh? You think it was some kinda trick? Well, if it was, it sure fooled me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}In summer, the girls show more skin to catch the fellows' eyes.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}It takes me back to the days when I'd find a sweetheart in summer and break up before fall...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}There are so many strange people out there... Like that young man I saw the other day.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}I just noticed that there seemed to be a gap in the stream of people walking.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}I wondered why, so I took a gander, and then I understood why nobody was walking there.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}It was this kid with no shirt on and long, gray hair. He had this weird aura to him...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}I ask you, what is this world coming to...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}So the culture festival was called off on account of the typhoon, eh? What a waste...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}Well, don't be too glum. You've got plenty of time to live, so you can wait for the next one.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}There's this friend I've had since we were in short pants. He's a great singer.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}He said, "When you die, I'll sing a song at your funeral."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}It was real nice of him. Him and me, we go waaay back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}Those youngsters who look all down in the mouth should try harder to make some friends...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}They're all on that "net" thing nowadays. They probably don't know how to talk to real people...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}This is the season where kids who don't have a sweetheart get all lonely. I blame the cold.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}Just don't try your hand with too many girls at once, or you could cause yourself some trouble.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}Don't be too hesitant to mix it up at a club. You could meet some new people![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}Those Mrs. Grundys at the PTA might disapprove, but you should dance till sunrise![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}A friend of mine just died... He always wanted to become an astronaut.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}He said to me, "Even when I die, I'll always watch out for you."[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}I'll remember him every time I look up at the night sky... In my heart, he's the best astronaut there is.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}On New Year's, I always get together with my old school friends for some sake.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}But every year... a few more of them don't show up. It can't be helped, at my age...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}Even if email is in vogue today, I'm still happy to get New Year's cards.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}You got any friends you could send New Year's cards to?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}You ever hear the rhyme? "Make new friends, but keep the old; one is silver, and the other's gold."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}At your age? Now that's depressing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}Your New Year's resolution oughta be to meet new people, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}It seems to be the thing to do to join that cult thing now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}Why isn't anyone trying to stop them from doing such a damn fool thing?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}You worry 'cause you're confused, and you're confused 'cause you don't know what to believe.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}Humans are frail creatures. It's hard for us to stand on our own two feet...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 400}My advice to you youngsters is to make friends, and believe in them with all your heart.[n]{f 1 1}
